descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 560 S2 For Sale 2014 | 4 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

If you are seeking a well-maintained, spacious catamaran - charter or private cruising - this Lagoon 560 S2 For Sale 2014 is worth considering. She reflects Lagoon’s reputation for liveaboard comfort, versatile layout, and reliability. This 2014 model is presented in good condition, maintained continuously, and is equipped for both long passages and memorable holidays on the water.

Lagoon 560 S2 For Sale 2014 – Key Specifications:

  • Year: 2014
  • Availability: End of 2025 season
  • Condition: Good, well-maintained
  • LOA: 17.07 m
  • Beam: 9.45 m
  • Draft: 1.5 m
  • Cabins: 4 double + 1 skipper cabin
  • Berths: 10
  • Heads: 5
  • Fuel Capacity: 1300 L
  • Water Capacity: 960 L
  • Engines: 2 x 110 hp Yanmar (4,100 hours)
  • Generator: Onan 21 kWa (new 2025)
  • Air Conditioning: 72,000 BTUs
  • Watermaker: Yes
  • Tender: RIB 3.10 m with Yamaha 40 hp outboard
  • Navigation Pack: Raymarine (2014), GPS-Plotter, Autopilot
  • Steering Wheel: 1
  • Main Sail: Fully battened, new 2025
  • Genoa/Staysail: Furling
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Tenderlift XL Hydraulic Platform: With remote
  • Refrigerators: 3 plus additional stainless fridge 130L
  • Ice Maker: 220V in cockpit
  • Sound System: Fusion Radio/DVD/CD/MP3, 6 loudspeakers & waterproof remote
  • WiFi onboard

This Lagoon 560 S2 For Sale 2014 is ready to welcome her new owners at the end of the 2025 season. Her layout, inventory, and continuous maintenance represent a solid option for those looking for a comfortable and proven platform for leisure or charter. For further details or to arrange a viewing, please get in touch for current pricing and availability.
